title: 1.2 practice
description: Practice what you learned in lesson 1.2.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the basic equation for increasing complexity?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Complex Chemical Compounds + Energy + Water = Life

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is one reason history is so valuable?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It can help you understand the present and prepare for the future.
It can help you understand the laws of the Universe.
It can help you understand what happened before our Universe existed.
It can help you understand how everything in the world works all on your own.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What are the visualizations we create in our heads to represent a place?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**How does scale-switching allow us to ask and answer big questions?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It allows us to gather pieces of evidence from across both time and space to make connections.
It allows us to move through time and space to learn from the successes and failures of different human civilizations.
It allows us to understand the lives of many different people throughout history.
It allows us to visualize places and how they are connected in our heads.
